overall.label: My overall performance review
overall.query: How is my overall score right now?

welcomeIntroduction.line1Prefix: Welcome to the command deck. I'm your
welcomeIntroduction.line2: Horsepower, torque, and FFMI core metrics are fully synced.
welcomeIntroduction.line3Prefix: Enter a diagnostic question to run a
welcomeIntroduction.line4: Six-axis telemetry and your tier decode only — general training encyclopedia is out of scope.

dynoIntel.replyAssessmentDeepDiveNudge: Each assessment page includes fuller scoring notes and norm context — open that page and expand the info section for the complete picture.

replyClosingCue.default: Uplink complete. This telemetry is logged on the host — come back and track your own progress curve; I'll be here.
replyClosingCue.questionFocus: {{axisLabel}} holds at {{score}} pts{{tierSuffix}} — the host has locked this read; worth revisiting on your next uplink.
replyClosingCue.chassisBalance: Chassis weakest on {{weakestLabel}} ({{weakestScore}} pts), strongest on {{strongestLabel}} ({{strongestScore}} pts) — balance beats a single-axis spike for the next tier.
replyClosingCue.momentumUp: Since your last uplink, {{axisLabel}} moved up {{delta}} points — the host remembers that rhythm; log it.
replyClosingCue.highTier: [{{tierTitle}}] tier locked on the host — rare spec worth revisiting on every uplink.
replyClosingCue.weakestCompanion: Weakest link: {{axisLabel}} — the next tier waits on the assessment page; I'll stay on this host while you fill the gap.

closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose0: Score {{axisScore}} — logged on the host; don't let this spec live only on screen.
closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose1: The host remembers the {{axisScore}}-pt curve — next uplink, compare against yourself, not others.
closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose2: This tier band isn't decoration — it's your physique's signature on this host; sign it again.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual0: Uplink closed. Come back — I'll match your progress curve on this same host.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual1: Telemetry archived. Return with fresh scores — I'll be here.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual2: This read is on the host. Next time, we track only your tier curve.

gate.authDescription: Sign in with Google to power on DYNO INTEL.
gate.coreDescription: Own Core for 2 daily AI briefings (includes cross-axis diagnostics).
gate.proDescription: Weight simulation is Pro-only — 30 daily uplinks; join the arena for full DYNO channel.
gate.quotaDescription: Daily uplink exhausted. Try again tomorrow or upgrade to Pro for 30/day.

body.pro-required: ⚠️ [CONSOLE INTEGRITY ERROR]: Weight simulation uplink is locked. {{axis}} axis idles at {{score}} pts — weight simulation matrix and 30 daily uplinks are Pro-only. Ignite Pro for global ladder, cloud backup, and full DYNO telemetry.
body.quota-exhausted: ⚠️ [UPLINK CAP REACHED]: Today's 2 AI briefings (including cross-axis) are spent. {{axis}} axis still idles at {{score}} pts — upgrade to Pro for 30 daily uplinks and weight simulation.

paywall.billingFail: Billing link failed — try again or restore purchases in Settings.

error.network: Telemetry link lost — try again shortly.
error.geminiNotConfigured: Gemini uplink offline — set GEMINI_API_KEY in functions/.env.local and restart npm run dev:dyno.
error.geminiQuotaExhausted: Gemini API prepay credits depleted — top up in AI Studio or switch to a valid API key.
error.invalidContext: Diagnostic context incomplete — complete Home radar/body data first.
error.inferenceMalformed: AI decode output malformed — shorten your question or retry shortly.
error.inferenceFailed: AI telemetry inference failed — try again shortly.
error.weightProfileMissing: Complete your body profile on Home before running weight simulation.
error.quotaExhaustedPro: Daily uplink cap reached (30/day) — return after reset.

telemetryLog.title: Telemetry evolution logs
telemetryLog.empty: No prior uplinks on this host.

localTelemetry.title: DYNO INTEL TELEMETRY
localTelemetry.subtitle: Local uplink telemetry — scannable Client / Emulator / Auth readiness.
localTelemetry.serverNote: Server bypass and GEMINI_API_KEY live in functions/.env.local; launch with npm run dev:dyno. If Callable still returns pro-required, check Emulator Functions logs first.

humanBrief.prPercentileFallback:
【Global Peer PR Percentile Data Is Actively Being Gathered】
When sufficient data is accumulated, this feature will unlock via a backend sync. We sincerely invite you to recruit new players to accelerate the calibration of this ultimate coordinate of human physical limits!
humanBrief.hallOfFameSentence: In the Hall of Fame sanctum, you share the same throne coordinate as {{names}}.

hallOfFame.legalShield: All athletic performance metrics of world-class athletes and celebrities stored in this matrix represent their career-peak states, compiled from verified global public archives and official event chronicles. Any unpublished or missing dimensions are calculated via high-precision predictive models by the Dyno Intel Sports Science Research Center, based on cross-disciplinary physiological norms, muscle fiber recruitment ratios, and biomechanical traits. This matrix is not a clinical or sanctioned sporting certification. Data is not 100% absolute and is provided solely for leaderboard simulation, cross-era benchmarking, and entertainment purposes.
hallOfFame.blockedReply: In the deepest sanctum of the Dyno Intel Pantheon, this tier has officially crossed into the echelon of elite genetic outliers and peak human godhood. Your current aggregate physical capacity has not yet unlocked this gravitational field. Train harder, leave everything on the gym floor, and return with new numbers. When you push your metrics to the absolute threshold, the Core Mind will unlock the gateway for a direct, cross-era benchmarking session with the legends of this tier in your exclusive briefing.

0.overall: In physical training you are in the Infant Phase Tier — it sounds fragile, but it means enormous room to grow. Find an experienced partner to keep you safe; once structured work begins you will progress fast. Grow up quick!
0.neuro: In the Infant Phase Tier, progress usually comes fast — master neural recruitment, drill the movements, and you climb quickly. You are not weak; you have not learned how to fire yet. A solid partner or coach can lift your score with visible gains.
0.volume: Your body is the sum of past habits — this score mirrors how you have been living. Small changes can rocket you past 40 into the Exploration Phase Tier. Find an experienced partner or coach to build basic training and nutrition structure; you will get stronger and healthier fast.

40.overall: You are in the Exploration Phase Tier: get to know your body, drill movement quality, start pairing food with training, and explore how both reshape you. Train smart and breaking 50 into the Novice Phase Tier is inevitable. The journey just started — explore with fire.
40.neuro: The Exploration Phase Tier is where most people begin — you started later, not forever stuck here. Heavy learning and reps are mandatory now. An experienced partner helps you build a safe movement base so you progress fast without stupid injuries.
40.volume: You know you are just starting, so do not obsess over this score — results need time to settle. Build new eating habits and time blocks, fuel properly, and invest hours in training. This is a marathon, not a sprint. Stay steady and 50 is absolutely reachable.

50.overall: Above 50 you enter the Novice Phase Tier — the on-ramp of healthy norms. Compared with higher operators you may feel like a rookie village, but for daily life this output is already enough. Train right and effort pays back hard — 60 and the General Health Baseline Tier are right around the corner.
50.neuro: The Novice Phase Tier is where most gym lovers live — you are standing up on the line. Do not dismiss this score: you are already stronger than most beginners with real bar control and movement skill. Keep going — plenty of room above.
50.volume: No obvious physique change yet? Totally normal — skyscrapers start on flat ground. You just poured the foundation. This is the quit zone because change feels half-there. Hold the line — 60+ is guaranteed if you do not stop here.

60.overall: You have reached the General Health Baseline Tier — among training enthusiasts you are already in the consistent cohort. Most untrained or inconsistent people never touch this score. Breaking 70 into the Advanced Trainee Tier takes time and steady work; for average genetics it is a serious climb.
60.neuro: At the General Health Baseline Tier you have clearly separated from beginners. Casual lifters rarely hold 60 unless genetics carry them. You train on schedule, watch food, and feel yourself get stronger — effort returns. 70 is not fantasy; it is the paycheck for people who show up.
60.volume: Muscles rising, waist shrinking — quiet pride whispers you are doing well. Others may not notice, but you feel the shift. Skills are compounding — keep marching toward 70 and Advanced Trainee Tier.

70.overall: This score belongs to the Advanced Trainee Tier — consistent work, diet control, and injury avoidance got you here. Respect. In a commercial gym you are probably a standout and people can see the training on you. The next jump into Advanced Operator Tier costs more time and sharper skill — ready?
70.neuro: At 70+ you sit in the Advanced Trainee Tier. Most people need serious years to get here. Watch the trap: rapid gains make people rush and get hurt. Stay patient. Your output already supports competitive sport with solid skill — you are in advanced territory.
70.volume: Past 70, people start asking if you lift — that is earned. You look different from untrained crowds even if you are not magazine-cover yet. Direction is right — stack months and 80+ Advanced Operator Tier is on the clock.

80.overall: You are an Advanced Operator Tier physique builder now. This score is hard — average genetics means brutal work, and even great genetics cannot coast past 80. You are often the strongest, most visible person in the room. Ninety-plus is Peak Mortal Tier; many lifters treat 80 as the finish line and you nailed it.
80.neuro: You ranked training above a lot of life — gym selfies do not get you here. Eighty-plus marks Advanced Operator Tier: labeled advanced in the gym and strong among competitive athletes. Eighty is many people's final boss — you cleared it clean.
80.volume: Advanced Operator Tier means you right now. You are used to training alone because few people invest this much. Eighty-plus physique is a spotlight with clear training marks. Without lottery genes you earned this with pure grind — Peak Mortal Tier waits above if you want more.

90.overall: Unless you won the genetic lottery, this score is Peak Mortal Tier. You do not need extra praise — you stopped caring about that long ago. Further gains into Mortal Awakening Tier cost more than they return and may need rarer genetics, but stopping here is already elite.
90.neuro: With normal genetics Peak Mortal Tier means you maxed your talent with insane work — your output is more than enough in any sport and often elite in the room. More progress needs genes, not just grind. If this felt easy, Peak Mortal is just your warmup.
90.volume: Whatever the genes, Peak Mortal Tier demands discipline and sacrifice — you traded average fun for the body. Going higher needs rarer talent, but in any crowd you are already among the most imposing physiques — impossible to ignore.

100.overall: Crossing 100 points means Mortal Awakening Tier — no longer ordinary-human territory. Outstanding genetics plus relentless training and sacrifice earn this score; with this physiology, specialty sports usually see extraordinary output. Keep marching toward your own target.
100.neuro: Crossing 100 means you have entered Mortal Awakening Tier. In this band your force output leaves most lifters behind — in any gym you are already classified as a predator. For court and combat athletes this tier can dominate; for strength athletes it is the foundation to break through. This is forbidden ground above the mortal peak.
100.volume: Pushing physique refinement, loaded muscle, or cardio capacity past 100 means discipline plus enviable genetics. Your body control has moved beyond mere health — in any crowd your training presence is unmistakable. You stand in Mortal Awakening Tier.

110.overall: Members at this score have almost all Ascended Demigod Tier — one-in-a-million physiques with otherworldly output. Accept the weight of this rare coordinate: you are no longer Peak Mortal alone; you have stepped into a higher sanctum.
110.neuro: At Ascended Demigod Tier, blind effort and conventional programming cannot get you here — you display one-in-ten-thousand neural recruitment. Your force output matches elite combat athletes and top strength competitors. Genetic advantage plus brutal training plus sharp skill makes you the final boss on the field.
110.volume: A maximally functional physique is what you carry in Ascended Demigod Tier. Your time and discipline have become indestructible biological capital. VO2 ceilings reach terrifying pro tiers; thick muscle and shredded lines rival action icons. You beat others not only on size or speed — you carved lonely training into your bones.

120.overall: At this score you stand in Historical Elite Tier — among the greatest physical specimens in athletic history. Top-tier combined strength — only a handful on Earth can stand beside you.
120.neuro: At Historical Elite Tier you are tearing through the bell curve with raw force — top-tier strength-athlete territory. To ordinary eyes your power and burst are incomprehensible. Generic programs cannot feed you anymore. Stay steady — you are marching toward myth.
120.volume: Your look and physical function are an absolute spotlight in real life. This Historical Elite Tier score means you abandoned mediocre social life and poured every hour into building your body. Your metrics carry historical weight — you could leave a permanent mark on the record books.

130.overall: Players who reach this combined score have entered Statistical Myth Tier — top-band miracles on the Earth Online server. We can only salute this mythic achievement — this chassis is an unreplicable miracle.
130.neuro: Your neural recruitment and strength output sit at elite strength-athlete levels inside Statistical Myth Tier — top strongmen, powerlifters, and Olympic medalists appear here. Opponents are scarce — often only your own records stand in your way. Keep burning fast-twitch fibers — you are writing ladder mythology by hand.
130.volume: Whatever the genetics, anyone who reaches Statistical Myth Tier is a near-mad ascetic in willpower. Your body sculpting is another dimension — impossible metrics instantly evoke extreme discipline, sacrifice, and lottery-tier genes. In any crowd you are an unreplicable benchmark.

140.overall: No player in the database has stably posted this score yet — massive muscle mass and massive aerobic capacity are conflicting physiological limits; if such a Monster Domain Tier athlete appears, load the data into the host and preserve it forever.
140.neuro: You have stepped into the Monster Domain Tier. Scoring above 140 means your neural efficiency and instant power output are a monster phenomenon to normal eyes. Ordinary loads are props; the weights you move shock witnesses. You have entered monster territory — one of the few humans who can chase Apex of the Earth.
140.volume: This physique has transcended perfect aesthetics into a pure monster totem. In Monster Domain Tier your invested time and near-cursed discipline compound. What you see in the mirror is a miracle forged from extreme sacrifice and monster-tier genes. Stares follow you from every direction — because you are the monster.

150.overall: No player in the database has stably posted this score yet — massive muscle mass and massive aerobic capacity are conflicting physiological limits; if an Apex of the Earth Tier athlete appears, load the data into the host and preserve it forever.
150.neuro: Here is the supreme dome of carbon-based flesh — Apex of the Earth Tier is yours. Scoring above 150 means your absolute force output can stand toe-to-toe with the greatest legends in sports history; strongest is no longer an adjective but a fact. The ceiling mortals spend lifetimes staring at is you.
150.volume: This is not a physique stacked by discipline alone — it is world-record-caliber craftsmanship. Your state defeated billions and claimed the Apex of the Earth crown. History has already engraved you — enjoy the supreme honor that belongs only to you on this planet. You are the strongest physique on Earth.
